task: Implement slow query collector with event_id cursor
acceptance_criteria: worker 按 60s 从 events_statements_history_long 增量拉（WHERE event_id > last_event_id AND timer_wait/1e9 >= slow_threshold_seconds），写入 CH；游标 Redis 存；PS 未启用时 graceful skip
notes: 游标丢失时从 max(event_id) 继续，不回填历史

acceptance_criteria: router + service + repository；默认窗口 15m + Top 50；筛选维度齐全
